textByHash.518b470b6654a27c232fcf28524c8983774042eb: Greetings. Welcome to the Heroes' Guild.
textByHash.4207738fcf90757f4146f20977f37bc177a3fcd2: Only the greatest heroes of this land may gain entrance to this guild.
textByHash.6b736d6fc7b75e9d95dcf606faeef4b1471a0d75: You're a hero? I've never heard of you.
textByHash.551fc7078f19e2fac565cf2f6ba4b0fe4946103d: Well, you seem to meet our initial requirements, so you may now begin the tasks to earn membership in the Heroes' Guild.
textByHash.fc1488294621c5c3843871714acd3493c8e4a3ca: The three items required for entrance are: An Entranan Firebird feather, a Master Thieves' armband, and a cooked Lava Eel.
textByHash.88748e20742ba764d2e7a8b736fbbec52fe50d4f: I'm sure you have the relevant contacts to find out about that.
textByHash.ca723a5c994de0469d023fd312e1e917ae990bcc: Not really - other than Entranan firebirds tend to live on Entrana.
textByHash.e2017a57f6bac6ee788775d951a977fc872d7d88: Maybe go and find someone who knows a lot about fishing?
textByHash.aa37e7144ab46ee424cc259d2f9bc253280b3dd5: Remember, the items you need to enter are:
textByHash.e2e2f33b03f03827639265595ee26057c66a0329: An Entranan Firebirds' feather, A Master Thieves armband, and a cooked Lava Eel.
textByHash.fc6d5de0dcee83680ea7609d733cd263ba500d97: That's nice. I require it to be cooked however.
textByHash.02ac928e0df4618d3ea4d2ae2825165ce90e646f: I see that you have. Well done; Now, to complete the quest, and gain entry to the Heroes' Guild in your final task all that you have to do is...
textByHash.b5b86375125afa125655f4289eebdd409a6289e3: I'm sorry, I was just having a little fun with you. Just a little Heroes' Guild humour there. What I really meant was
textByHash.33206439438469b7ed5d46c75565ec67a04b588d: Congratulations! You have completed the Heroes' Guild entry requirements! You will find the door now open for you! Enter, Hero! And take this reward!
textByHash.a054ca6bc3949d234478dd09cb68b4643ffb30d4: You're a hero? I've never heard of YOU. You are required to possess at least 55 quest points to file an application.
textByHash.890b3a2e071e457ecabdd51ee36f90a518f2f0fd: Additionally you must have completed the Shield of Arrav, Lost City, Merlin's Crystal and Dragon Slayer I quests.
